use_cases: Secure SMS or email verification during user registration
Two-factor authentication code entry for login flows
Payment or transaction confirmation via one-time codes
Account recovery verification through email or SMS codes
Multi-step verification processes requiring sequential code input
ai_summary: The Educlopez AnimatedOTPInput is a specialized form input component designed for entering one-time passwords or verification codes in authentication workflows. This composite component typically renders multiple input cells that auto-advance focus as users type, supporting keyboard navigation between fields. It integrates with Radix UI primitives and follows flat/minimalist design principles suitable for secure authentication interfaces across various platforms.
